topic: r7g Instance Type Family Features and Performance

  entities:
  
    r7g family|Product
    AWS Graviton3 processor|Product
    Graviton3 processor|Product
    r6g instances|Product
    r6g family|Product
    r7g.large|Product
    r7g.16xlarge|Product
    AWS Graviton3 ARM-based processors|Product
    OLTP workloads|Service
    OLAP workloads|Service
  
  proposition: The r7g family is a family of instance types.
    
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7g family|IS_TYPE_OF|family of instance types
      
  proposition: The r7g family uses the AWS Graviton3 processor.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    r7g family|USES|AWS Graviton3 processor
  
    entity-attributes:
    
  proposition: The AWS Graviton3 processor is a processor.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    AWS Graviton3 processor|IS_TYPE_OF|processor
    
  proposition: The AWS Graviton3 processor delivers better price/performance than previous Graviton2-based instances.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    AWS Graviton3 processor|HAS_PERFORMANCE|better price/performance than previous Graviton2-based instances
    
  proposition: The Graviton3 processor offers 25-30% better performance for OLTP-style graph queries compared to r6g instances.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    Graviton3 processor|HAS_PERFORMANCE|25-30% better performance for OLTP-style graph queries compared to r6g instances
    
  proposition: The r6g family is a family of instance types.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    r6g family|IS_TYPE_OF|family of instance types
    
  proposition: The r7g family has a single-socket architecture.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    r7g family|HAS_ARCHITECTURE|single-socket architecture
    
  proposition: The r7g family's single-socket architecture means that performance scales linearly with compute capacity from an r7g.large to an r7g.16xlarge.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    r7g family|CONTAINS|r7g.large
    r7g family|CONTAINS|r7g.16xlarge
  
    entity-attributes:
    r7g family|HAS_SCALING|performance scales linearly with compute capacity from an r7g.large to an r7g.16xlarge
    
  proposition: The r7g.large is an instance type in the r7g family.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    r7g.large|PART_OF|r7g family
  
    entity-attributes:
    r7g.large|IS_TYPE_OF|instance type
    
  proposition: The r7g.16xlarge is the largest type in the r7g family.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    r7g.16xlarge|PART_OF|r7g family
  
    entity-attributes:
    r7g.16xlarge|IS_SIZE|largest type in the r7g family
    
  proposition: The r7g.16xlarge is an instance type in the r7g family.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    r7g.16xlarge|PART_OF|r7g family
  
    entity-attributes:
    r7g.16xlarge|IS_TYPE_OF|instance type
    
  proposition: The r7g family is powered by AWS Graviton3 ARM-based processors.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    r7g family|POWERED_BY|AWS Graviton3 ARM-based processors
  
    entity-attributes:
    
  proposition: The AWS Graviton3 ARM-based processors are ARM-based processors.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    AWS Graviton3 ARM-based processors|IS_TYPE_OF|ARM-based processors
    
  proposition: The r7g family has improved memory-paging performance compared to r6g.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    r7g family|HAS_PERFORMANCE|improved memory-paging performance compared to r6g
    
  proposition: The r7g family's improved memory-paging performance benefits both OLTP and OLAP workloads.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    r7g family|BENEFITS|OLTP workloads
    r7g family|BENEFITS|OLAP workloads
  
    entity-attributes:
    
  proposition: OLTP workloads are workloads.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    OLTP workloads|IS_TYPE_OF|workloads
    
  proposition: OLAP workloads are workloads.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    OLAP workloads|IS_TYPE_OF|workloads
    
  proposition: The r7g family has enhanced buffer-pool cache efficiency.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    r7g family|HAS_EFFICIENCY|enhanced buffer-pool cache efficiency
    
  proposition: The r7g family has lower latency for memory-intensive operations.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    r7g family|HAS_LATENCY|lower latency for memory-intensive operations
    
  proposition: The r7g family is well-suited for production environments with varied query patterns.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    r7g family|SUITED_FOR|production environments with varied query patterns
    
  proposition: The r7g family is particularly effective for workloads that benefit from improved memory bandwidth.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    r7g family|EFFECTIVE_FOR|workloads that benefit from improved memory bandwidth
